name: Branch of a Foreign Company
rationale: Foreign branch — cross-border control and licensing verification

name: Branch of a UAE Company
rationale: Domestic branch — simpler ownership traceability

name: Charity / Non-Profit Organisation (NPO)
rationale: TF/sanctions abuse potential — Policy 8.2 EDD & Head of Compliance approval

name: Commercial Free Zone Establishment (FZE / FZ-LLC)
rationale: Free-zone structure — enhanced UBO and licensing checks

name: Commercial FZE — Virtual Office / Flexi-desk
rationale: Limited physical presence — opacity and shell risk

name: Cooperative
rationale: Member-owned cooperative — transparent membership

name: Embassy / Consulate / Diplomatic Mission
rationale: Diplomatic mission — sovereign immunity and enhanced due diligence

name: Federal Government
rationale: Sovereign federal entity — low private ML typology

name: Financial Free Zone Establishment
rationale: Financial free-zone — regulated FI licensing verification required

name: Financial FZE — Virtual Office / Flexi-desk
rationale: Financial FZE without physical presence — shell-bank typology risk

name: Government Entity
rationale: Government-owned or linked entity

name: Holding Company
rationale: Passive holding — UBO opacity and layered control

name: Joint Liability Company
rationale: Joint liability partnership — shared control complexity

name: Joint Venture / Joint Participation
rationale: JV structure — multi-party control and purpose verification

name: Limited Liability Company (LLC)
rationale: Standard LLC/SME — ordinary ownership structure; verify UBO, licensing and purpose (CRAM LP/MER parameter library §2)

name: Limited Liability Partnership (LLP)
rationale: LLP — professional partnership with registered partners

name: General Partnership
rationale: General partnership — partner identification required

name: Private Joint Stock Company
rationale: Private JSC — shareholder register verification

name: Private Limited Company
rationale: Private limited — standard corporate transparency

name: Public Joint Stock Company (PJSC)
rationale: Listed PJSC — public disclosure and regulator oversight

name: Regulated Money Service Business (MSB)
rationale: Licensed MSB — CBUAE licensing, EDD and TM at reduced thresholds

name: Semi-Government Entity
rationale: Semi-government — mixed public/private control

name: Simple Partnership Company
rationale: Simple partnership — partner KYC required

name: Sole Proprietorship
rationale: Single owner — direct UBO equals account holder

name: Special Purpose Vehicle / Entity (SPV)
rationale: SPV — purpose, funding source and ultimate beneficiary verification

name: Trust / Nominee / Fiduciary Account
rationale: Trust/nominee — legal arrangement transparency and settlor/beneficiary ID

name: Under-formation Entity
rationale: Entity in formation — limited activity until licensed

name: Unregulated Money Service Business (MSB)
rationale: Unregulated MSB — absolute prohibition; reject / exit relationship (OVR-006)
